stemHtml: With regards to engine parameters, the Flight Warning Computer…

options.a: Analyses the variation rate of the main engine parameters to prevent exceedance of certain thresholds.
options.b: Automatically shuts down the engine in case of exceedance of certain thresholds.
options.c: Performs engine trend monitoring in case of exceedance of certain thresholds.
options.d: Triggers an alert in case of exceedance of certain thresholds.
